nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 乌拉圭

nodes.name: Crested black tyrant
nodes.summary: Crested black tyrant（Crested black tyrant，学名 Knipolegus lophotes），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The crested black tyrant (Knipolegus lophotes) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The crested black tyrant is found in Brazil from southern Bahia south to Rio Grande do Sul and west to southern Mato Grosso and its range continues into northern and eastern Uruguay
